race.comment: SO POLITE (8) has shown plenty of early speed in her two runs back but has just been run down late when up in grade. Near her top now and drops back a level or two. Expect her to burn across early and prove very tough to run down. BRIMARVI ROSEMARIE (6) returns short of a preferred trip but will relish the anticipated tempo. Expect to see her blending in at just the right time and be lengthening nicely late.  YOU'RESOGOLDEN (5) resumes from a short break. Showed positive signs last prep and is another speedy type. Expect her to push forward and give backers a sight. COSTLESS (3) stuck on gamely into the placings last time at Bordertown. Strips fitter third-up and should be thereabouts.
